data.name: lblDesc1.Text
data.value: Novaflex Athletics is a performance training brand dedicated to improving strength, mobility, and athletic conditioning. Through this partnership, our gym collaborates with Novaflex to support advanced training programs and provide members with modern fitness solutions designed for both beginners and professional athletes.

data.name: lblDesc2.Text
data.value: VitalCore Wellness focuses on recovery and injury prevention services for active individuals. Their partnership with our gym helps members maintain balanced training routines through wellness education, recovery strategies, and professional guidance that supports long-term health and fitness performance.

data.name: lblDesc3.Text
data.value: IronPeak Training Co. specializes in strength development and structured workout systems used by fitness communities worldwide. By partnering with our gym, they contribute training insights and innovative fitness approaches that help members achieve consistent progress in their workouts.
